auth_errorInvalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth_errorNetwork: Unable to connect to server. Please check your internet connection.
auth_errorServer: Server configuration error. Please try again later.
auth_errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth_errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth_errorUnknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
dashboard_createFirst: Create your first organization to get started.
dashboard_setupCenterDesc: Finish the core setup so invoices, imports, and reports have the right company data.
dashboard_workspaceReadyDesc: Jump into invoicing, banking, and reporting, or review the setup areas you will revisit most.
dashboard_workspaceSetupDesc: Complete a few key setup areas so your invoices, imports, and reports start from clean company data.
dashboard_setupTaskCompanyDesc: Add registration, VAT, and contact details that appear on documents and declarations.
dashboard_setupTaskBrandingDesc: Set invoice branding, bank details, and payment terms before sending documents.
dashboard_setupTaskOpeningBalancesDesc: Import your starting balances or review the chart of accounts before posting live activity.
dashboard_setupTaskContactsDesc: Create or import your first customer and supplier records before invoicing.
dashboard_setupTaskPeriodLockDesc: When you go live, set a lock date to prevent accidental back-dated changes.
dashboard_reviewQueueTitle: Keep the next close from drifting
dashboard_reviewQueueDesc: Review the items that still need an accountant decision before the next close or filing window.
dashboard_reviewPortfolioTitle: See what needs attention across your companies
dashboard_reviewPortfolioDesc: Sort the month by risk, switch into the right workspace, and keep close work from hiding inside individual tenants.
dashboard_reviewPortfolioNoIssues: Nothing urgent is drifting across your current tenant portfolio.
dashboard_reviewNoOverdue: No overdue invoices need attention right now.
dashboard_reviewNoBankingExceptions: No unmatched bank transactions are waiting for review.
dashboard_reviewNoCloseHistory: No close or reopen actions have been recorded yet.
dashboard_reviewNoJournalEntries: No recent journal entries to review yet.
invoices_createFirst: Create your first invoice to get started
invoices_importDescription: Upload a CSV file with one invoice line per row. Rows are grouped by invoice_number and invoice_type.
invoices_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing.
invoices_importTemplateHint: Supported columns: invoice_number, invoice_type, contact_code/contact_name/contact_email/contact_reg_code, issue_date, due_date, status, amount_paid, reference, notes, line_description, quantity, unit, unit_price, discount_percent, vat_rate.
invoices_heroDesc: Track what is ready to send, what is still outstanding, and which periods are already protected before you bill or import more documents.
invoices_totalInvoicesHint: documents in the current filtered view
invoices_contactsFirstDesc: Create or import the customer and supplier records first so invoices can reuse payment terms, VAT details, and contact matching.
invoices_contactsFirstItemOne: Imported invoices can match contacts by code, registry code, email, or name.
invoices_contactsFirstItemTwo: New invoices are easier to review when contact defaults are already set.
invoices_closeStatusTitle: The close date affects new billing
invoices_closeStatusDesc: Invoices dated on or before {date} are blocked until that period is reopened.
invoices_closeStatusItemOne: Use company settings to move the lock forward after month-end review.
invoices_closeStatusItemTwo: Reopening a period requires a note for the audit trail.
invoices_importLegacyTitle: Bring in the invoices you still need to settle
invoices_importLegacyDesc: Import historical open invoices before you create new live ones so outstanding balances and reminders stay consistent.
invoices_importLegacyItemOne: Use one CSV row per invoice line and preserve legacy invoice numbers.
invoices_importLegacyItemTwo: Review overdue balances after import so reminder workflows start cleanly.
contacts_importDescription: Upload a CSV file with one contact per row. The name column is required.
contacts_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing.
contacts_importTemplateHint: Supported columns: name, contact_type, code, reg_code, vat_number, email, phone, address_line1, city, postal_code, country_code, payment_terms_days, credit_limit, notes.
contacts_createFirst: Create your first contact to get started
contacts_heroDesc: Keep your customer and supplier master list clean before you start billing, importing balances, or chasing overdue invoices.
contacts_totalContactsHint: active contact records in this filtered view
contacts_termsHint: average payment terms across visible contacts
contacts_firstImportDesc: Start with customers and suppliers from your current system so invoicing and imports match against real counterparties.
contacts_firstImportItemOne: Use the CSV template to keep names, codes, and payment terms aligned.
contacts_firstImportItemTwo: Bring in both customers and suppliers before importing legacy invoices.
contacts_readyForBillingTitle: This workspace is ready for billing
contacts_readyForBillingDesc: Your contacts are in place. Next, create the first invoice or import the open sales and purchase documents you still need to collect.
contacts_readyForBillingItemOne: Keep VAT numbers and payment terms current for each counterparty.
contacts_readyForBillingItemTwo: Use contact codes consistently so imports map cleanly.
contacts_filterHint: {count} visible contacts in the current view.
accounts_importDescription: Upload a CSV file with one account per row. Required columns: code, name, account_type.
accounts_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing.
accounts_importTemplateHint: Supported columns: code, name, account_type, description, parent_code.
payments_createFirst: Record your first payment to get started
cashPayments_noPayments: No cash payments found. Record your first cash transaction.
quotes_noQuotes: No quotes found. Create your first quote to get started.
quotes_confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this quote?
orders_noOrders: No orders found. Create your first order to get started.
orders_confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
orders_confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this order?
assets_noAssets: No fixed assets found. Create your first asset to get started.
assets_confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this asset?
inventory_noProducts: No products found. Create your first product to get started.
inventory_noWarehouses: No warehouses found. Create your first warehouse to get started.
inventory_noCategories: No product categories found. Create a category to organize your products.
inventory_confirmDeleteProduct: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
inventory_confirmDeleteWarehouse: Are you sure you want to delete this warehouse?
inventory_confirmDeleteCategory: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
journal_noEntriesDesc: Create your first journal entry to record a transaction.
journal_minTwoLines: At least two lines with amounts are required
journal_noTenantSelected: No tenant selected. Please select a tenant from the dashboard.
journal_selectTenantDashboard: Please select a tenant from the
journal_importDescription: Upload a balanced CSV file with account_code, debit, and credit columns to create and post an opening-balance journal entry.
journal_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing.
journal_importTemplateHint: Supported columns: account_code, debit, credit, description.
journal_heroDesc: Review recent ledger activity, post drafts, and bring opening balances in without leaving the accounting workspace.
journal_closeControlDesc: Transactions dated on or before {date} are locked. Reopen the period only if you need to correct a prior close.
journal_closeControlItemOne: Posting and voiding older entries follows the same lock date.
journal_closeControlItemTwo: Use company settings to review close and reopen history.
journal_openingBalanceTitle: Load your opening balances before going live
journal_openingBalanceDesc: Import a balanced opening entry so the general ledger starts from the same numbers as your previous system.
journal_openingBalanceItemOne: Use the opening balance template to map account codes and amounts.
journal_openingBalanceItemTwo: Once month-end is reviewed, close the period from company settings instead of editing dates manually.
reports_noBalancesForDate: No account balances found for this date.
reports_trialBalanceNotBalanced: Trial balance is NOT in balance!
reports_bsBalanced: Balance sheet is in balance (Assets = Liabilities + Equity)
reports_bsNotBalanced: Balance sheet is NOT in balance!
reports_selectTenantDashboard: Please select a tenant from the
recurring_createFirst: Create your first recurring invoice to automate billing.
recurring_sendEmailOnGeneration: Send email when invoice is generated
recurring_recipientOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use contact email
recurring_emailMessagePlaceholder: Additional message to include in email
banking_noTransactions: No transactions found. Import a bank statement to get started.
bankingImport_selectCsvFile: Select a CSV file to preview
bankingImport_selectFileAndAccount: Please select a file and bank account
tax_noDeclarations: No VAT declarations yet. Generate one to get started.
employees_emptyState: No employees found. Add your first employee to get started with payroll.
employees_importDescription: Upload a CSV of employee master data and optionally set recurring base salaries in the same step.
employees_importTemplateHint: Use the template to keep employee numbers, dates, and salary columns aligned.
employees_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing.
employees_noMatches: No employees match the current search.
payroll_emptyState: No payroll runs found for {year}. Create a new payroll run to calculate employee salaries.
payroll_notesPlaceholder: Optional notes about this payroll run
payroll_noPayslips: No payslips found. Calculate the payroll to generate payslips.
payroll_importHistoryDescription: Import finalized historical payroll runs from CSV. Each row should describe one employee payslip for a payroll period.
payroll_importHistoryHint: Use employee_number, personal_code, email, or first and last name to match existing employees.
payroll_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing payroll history.
tsd_emptyState: No TSD declarations found for {year}. Generate TSD from an approved payroll run first.
tsd_manualSubmissionInfo: Automatic e-MTA submission is not yet available. Export your TSD as XML and upload it manually to the
tsd_step1Desc: Create and calculate payroll for the period
tsd_step2Desc: Review and approve the calculated payroll
tsd_step3Desc: Generate TSD declaration from approved payroll
tsd_step4Desc: Download the TSD in XML format
tsd_step5Desc: Log into e-MTA portal and upload the XML file
tsd_step6Desc: Mark as submitted with the e-MTA reference number
tsd_emtaRefHelp: Enter the reference number you received from e-MTA after submitting
settings_companyProfileDesc: Manage company details, branding, VAT number, and regional settings.
settings_emailSettingsDesc: Configure SMTP settings and email templates.
settings_pluginsDesc: Enable or disable plugins for your organization.
settings_usersDesc: Manage team members and their access levels.
settings_periodLockHelp: Transactions dated on or before this date cannot be created, posted, or voided.
settings_periodCloseIntro: Close and reopen accounting periods with an audit trail instead of editing the lock date directly.
settings_periodSuggestedCloseHelp: This suggests the next month-end after the current lock date.
settings_closePeriodHelp: Use this after month-end checks are complete. The lock moves forward and blocks older write operations.
settings_closeNotePlaceholder: Optional note for reviewers and future reopen decisions
settings_reopenPeriodHelp: Use this only when corrections are required after a close. A note is required for the audit trail.
settings_reopenNotePlaceholder: Explain why this period is being reopened
settings_periodHistoryHelp: Recent close and reopen actions for this tenant.
settings_periodHistoryEmpty: No close history yet. Your first close will appear here.
settings_heroDesc: Keep company identity, invoice defaults, and close controls aligned so every import, document, and month-end review starts from the same baseline.
settings_heroAsideTitle: These settings power the rest of the workspace
settings_heroAsideDesc: Save the company profile here once, then reuse it everywhere else from invoicing and imports to declarations and close controls.
settings_heroAsideItemOne: Registration, VAT, and contact details flow into exported documents and reports.
settings_heroAsideItemTwo: Close and reopen history gives reviewers an audit trail instead of ad hoc lock-date edits.
settings_noTenantSelected: No tenant selected. Please select a tenant from the dashboard.
settings_selectTenantDashboard: Please select a tenant from the dashboard.
settings_currencyNoChange: Currency cannot be changed after creation
settings_usedInPdf: Used in PDF invoices and branding
settings_logoTooLarge: Logo file must be less than 500KB
settings_addressPlaceholder: Street address, City, Postal code, Country
settings_pdfFooterPlaceholder: Custom footer text for PDF invoices
settings_yearEndDesc: Review the closed year, confirm retained earnings mapping, and post the carry-forward journal on the first day of the next fiscal year.
settings_yearEndCarryForwardDateHelp: The carry-forward entry posts on the first day of the next fiscal year.
settings_yearEndNetIncomeHelp: Calculated from revenue and expense activity for the selected fiscal year.
settings_yearEndRetainedEarningsHelp: This equity account receives the year-end carry-forward difference when profit or loss is non-zero.
settings_yearEndChecklistDesc: Every item below should be green before you run carry-forward.
settings_yearEndChecklistDateDone: The selected date matches the fiscal year-end.
settings_yearEndChecklistDatePending: Choose the actual fiscal year-end for this company before posting carry-forward.
settings_yearEndChecklistCloseDone: The tenant is currently locked through {date}.
settings_yearEndChecklistClosePending: Close the fiscal year first so earlier write paths are locked.
settings_yearEndChecklistActivityDone: Revenue or expense balances were found for the selected fiscal year.
settings_yearEndChecklistActivityPending: No revenue or expense balances were found for the selected fiscal year.
settings_yearEndChecklistRetainedPending: Add or map a retained earnings equity account before posting carry-forward.
settings_yearEndNextActionDesc: This keeps the carry-forward explicit instead of bundling it into the lock action.
settings_yearEndExistingEntryDesc: Entry {entryNumber} was posted on {date} for this fiscal year.
settings_yearEndReadyDesc: The selected year-end is closed and has the inputs needed for a carry-forward journal.
settings_yearEndNotYearEndDesc: The selected date is not the fiscal year-end. Use {date} instead.
settings_yearEndNeedsCloseDesc: Run the normal period close through the fiscal year-end date before posting carry-forward.
settings_yearEndNoActivityDesc: No revenue or expense balances were found for this fiscal year, so there is nothing to carry forward.
settings_yearEndNeedsRetainedDesc: Add a retained earnings equity account so the net result has a destination account.
documents_subtitle: Attach the files that explain or support this accounting record.
documents_uploadDesc: Add PDFs, images, CSV files, or notes that belong with this record. Files up to 10 MB are supported.
documents_notesPlaceholder: Why this file matters, what it supports, or what was checked.
documents_fileRequired: Select at least one file before uploading.
documents_reviewError: Failed to update document review status.
email_smtpConfigDesc: Configure your email server to send invoices and notifications.
email_noEmailsSent: No emails have been sent yet.
email_enterTestEmail: Please enter a test email address
plugins_noPluginsDesc: No plugins have been installed on this instance yet. Contact your system administrator to install plugins.
plugins_noSettings: This plugin has no configurable settings.
plugins_confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable this plugin?
onboarding_subtitle: Let's set up your organization in just a few steps
onboarding_step3Desc: Add your first customer or supplier
onboarding_companyInfoDesc: Tell us about your company. This information will appear on your invoices.
onboarding_brandingDesc: Customize how your invoices look. You can skip this and set up later.
onboarding_logoTooLarge: Logo file must be less than 500KB
onboarding_bankDetailsHelp: Displayed on your invoices for payments
onboarding_addFirstContactDesc: Add a customer or vendor to get started. You can skip this step.
onboarding_contactImportHint: Prefer to load customers and suppliers in bulk? You can skip this step and import a CSV from Contacts later.
onboarding_allSetDesc: Your organization is ready to use. Here's what you can do next:
onboarding_afterSetupDesc: Import opening balances, review period lock, and check reports before posting live transactions.
onboarding_createInvoiceDesc: Draft and send your first invoice from the sales workflow.
onboarding_addContactsDesc: Create contacts manually or import a CSV when you have a larger list.
onboarding_importOpeningBalancesDesc: Bring your opening ledger into the system before entering current-period activity.
onboarding_moreSettingsDesc: Review period lock, bank details, branding, and other company controls.
plugins_subtitle: Manage plugins and registries for your Open Accounting instance
plugins_noPluginsInstalledDesc: Install plugins from registries or directly from GitHub/GitLab repositories.
plugins_noRegistriesDesc: Add plugin registries to discover and install community plugins.
plugins_repositoryUrlHelp: GitHub or GitLab repository URL containing plugins.yaml
plugins_installUrlHelp: Enter the GitHub or GitLab repository URL. The repository must contain a valid plugin.yaml manifest and a LICENSE file.
plugins_reviewPermissionsNotice: This plugin requires the following permissions. Review each carefully before enabling.
plugins_permissionWarning: This plugin requests high-risk permissions. Only enable if you trust the source.
plugins_searchPlaceholder: Search plugins by name, description, or tags...
plugins_searchHint: Enter a search term to find plugins across all registered marketplaces.
plugins_confirmRemoveRegistry: Are you sure you want to remove this registry?
plugins_confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"? This will remove all plugin data.
errors_unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
errors_emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors_sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
modal_urlIdentifierHint: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
reminder_select_at_least_one: Please select at least one invoice
reminder_message_placeholder: Add a custom message to include in the reminder email...
reminder_message_hint: This message will be included in the reminder email
leave_importDescription: Import or update employee leave balances from CSV. Rows are matched by employee, leave type, and year.
leave_importHint: Use employee_number, personal_code, email, or first and last name for employees; use absence_type_code, absence_type, or absence_type_id for leave types.
leave_importFileRequired: Choose a CSV file before importing leave balances.
calc_subtitle: Calculate Estonian payroll taxes from gross salary
calc_pension_help: 0% if not enrolled, 2% standard, 4% increased rate
calc_enter_salary: Enter a gross salary to see calculations
costCenter_description: Manage cost centers for expense tracking and budget allocation
costCenter_noCostCentersDescription: Create cost centers to track expenses by department, project, or location
costCenter_deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete cost center "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
